title: 私たちはデビューした

text_block_list.text:
One day, while out for lunch, I come across King
Halo and her friends.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I always have the most perfect lunch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Which is why you, Sky, must hand over that last
plate of Kyoto salad!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Are you serious? Just go get a different salad!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuuuuse me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's so funny?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, nothing. I'm just kinda happy things feel
the same as always.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're here, Sei's here, and we're all eating
together.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I almost feel like our debut the other day was just
a dream. But...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know what you mean. Next year, we'll all be
doing the Classics together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Except I'll be the one to take the throne. Hey, Sky, pass me the soy sauce.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Get it yourself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I swear!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Everyone's lively today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Grass and El!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. It sounded like you all were having fun,
so I decided to come say hello.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way about having debuted. It's
almost surreal.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And now, we're officially competing with each
other.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe... Winners and losers are both born at
the sound of the starting gong!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I came across some interesting news!
Take a look at this article!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... "The Golden Generation Approaches
Their Classic Year."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Everyone's names and photos are here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And look! King's even got her own special feature!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's the treatment I deserve.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain the public is dying to witness my
ascent to the forefront of our generation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pshhh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what the public would think if you were
to suddenly "descend" instead?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's funny, because I was wondering what they would think if I made you descend!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nyahaha! You're scary.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The Classics... The Triple Crown tour... The
Japanese Derby too...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, hey, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, Special Week?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are you planning to run in the Derby? To become
the best in Japan?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am. I must win that G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could go a little harder on me
for today's session?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call it sudden. I'm just trying to be the
best Umamusume of my generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm King Halo. I have to win, no matter who I face.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I need to achieve results worthy of recognition.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right. So, if you understand, let's get sta—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: W-w-wooow! King!

(If I remember correctly, this is Kawakami
Princess. Many of the trainers regard her as quite
the go-getter.)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Kawakami. What's the matter? You
look like you've choked on a cherry tomato.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Look! Look! There's a special feature about you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: O-oh, that's right. There is.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's awesome! The way you talked about how you
wouldn't give up no matter what reminds me of
Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Princess Fighter?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I guess you don't know her. She's the
super-strong main character of this show that I
really love!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh wait, hang on. That's not what I'm here for.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah! I remembered! I wanted to tell you something!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be rooting for you in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: Well, she blew through like a storm.
Well, she blew through like a storm.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. That was certainly a new type of
encounter for me.
choice_data_list: She seems to really like you, though.
She seems to really like you, though.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I... can't refute that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But I won't content myself having gained
only one die-hard fan. I want the entire world to
recognize my talent.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The real competition is ahead. We must stay
focused, Trainer.
